parameters.query:
WITH p AS (
  INSERT INTO persons (name, telephone, email, created_at, updated_at)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.nome }}',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.email }}',
    now(), now()
  )
  RETURNING id
),
d AS (
  INSERT INTO commercial_deals (
    person_id, status, tier, segment, revenue_range, kommo_lead_id,
    sdr_user_id, ai_enabled, raw_payload, custom_properties,
    created_at, updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    p.id, 'open',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.tier }}',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.segmento }}',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.faturamento }}',
    '{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.id_kommo }}',
    (SELECT id FROM users WHERE lower(name) = 'clara'),
    true,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'utm_source',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_source }}',
      'utm_medium',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_medium }}',
      'utm_campaign', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_campaign }}',
      'utm_content',  '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_content }}',
      'utm_ad',       '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_term }}',
      'utm_adset',    '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_adset }}'
    ),
    jsonb_build_object('empresa', '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.empresa }}'),
    now(), now()
  FROM p
  RETURNING id, person_id
),
c AS (
  INSERT INTO commercial_conversations (
    commercial_deal_id, person_id, channel, origin, conversation_type,
    status, message_count, last_message_at, started_at, created_at, updated_at
  )
  SELECT d.id, d.person_id, 'whatsapp', 'ia', 'ia',
         'open', 1, now(), now(), now(), now()
  FROM d
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO commercial_conversation_messages (
  commercial_conversation_id, user_id, external_message_id,
  content, message_type, message_from, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT c.id,
       (SELECT id FROM users WHERE lower(name) = 'clara'),
       '{{ $json.id_start_message }}',
       '{{ $json.mensagem_final }}',
       'text', 'user', now(), now()
FROM c;

SELECT
  d.id                            AS deal_id,
  pe.name                         AS name,
  pe.telephone                    AS whatsapp,
  pe.email                        AS email,
  d.status,
  d.stage                         AS etapa_conversa,
  d.tier,
  d.segment                       AS segmento,
  d.kommo_lead_id                 AS kommo_id,
  d.custom_properties->>'empresa' AS empresa,
  u.name                          AS usuario,
  d.raw_payload->>'utm_source'    AS utm_source,
  d.raw_payload->>'utm_medium'    AS utm_medium,
  d.raw_payload->>'utm_campaign'  AS utm_campaign,
  d.raw_payload->>'utm_content'   AS utm_content,
  d.raw_payload->>'utm_ad'        AS utm_ad,
  d.raw_payload->>'utm_adset'     AS utm_adset,
  conv.total_mensagens            AS count_messages,
  conv.conversa,
  d.created_at,
  d.updated_at
FROM commercial_deals d
JOIN persons pe        ON pe.id = d.person_id
LEFT JOIN users u      ON u.id = d.sdr_user_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    count(m.id) AS total_mensagens,
    string_agg(
      '[' || to_char(m.created_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') || '] ' ||
      CASE m.message_from WHEN 'user' THEN 'Comercial' ELSE 'Lead' END
      || ': ' || m.content,
      E'\n' ORDER BY m.created_at
    ) AS conversa
  FROM commercial_conversations c
  JOIN commercial_conversation_messages m ON m.commercial_conversation_id = c.id
  WHERE c.commercial_deal_id = d.id
) conv ON true
WHERE pe.telephone = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}'
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC;

WITH d AS (
  -- acha o deal mais recente pelo telefone
  SELECT cd.id, cd.person_id
  FROM commercial_deals cd
  JOIN persons pe ON pe.id = cd.person_id
  WHERE pe.telephone = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}'
    AND cd.discarded_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY cd.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
upd_person AS (
  UPDATE persons pe
  SET name      = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.nome }}',
      telephone = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}',
      email     = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.email }}',
      updated_at = now()
  FROM d
  WHERE pe.id = d.person_id
  RETURNING pe.id
),
upd_deal AS (
  UPDATE commercial_deals cd
  SET tier          = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.tier }}',
      segment       = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.segmento }}',
      kommo_lead_id = '{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.id_kommo }}',
      sdr_user_id   = COALESCE(
                        (SELECT id FROM users WHERE lower(name) = 'clara'),
                        cd.sdr_user_id),
      raw_payload   = COALESCE(cd.raw_payload, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
                        'utm_source',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_source }}',
                        'utm_medium',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_medium }}',
                        'utm_campaign', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_campaign }}',
                        'utm_content',  '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_content }}',
                        'utm_ad',       '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_term }}',
                        'utm_adset',    '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_adset }}'
                      ),
      custom_properties = COALESCE(cd.custom_properties, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
                        'empresa', '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.empresa }}'
                      ),
      updated_at = now()
  FROM d
  WHERE cd.id = d.id
  RETURNING cd.id
),
conv AS (
  SELECT c.id
  FROM commercial_conversations c, d
  WHERE c.commercial_deal_id = d.id AND c.channel = 'whatsapp'
  ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
bump AS (
  UPDATE commercial_conversations c
  SET last_message_at = now(),
      message_count   = COALESCE(c.message_count, 0) + 1,
      updated_at      = now()
  FROM conv
  WHERE c.id = conv.id
  RETURNING c.id
)
INSERT INTO commercial_conversation_messages (
  commercial_conversation_id, user_id, external_message_id,
  content, message_type, message_from, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT conv.id,
       (SELECT id FROM users WHERE lower(name) = 'clara'),
       '{{ $json.id_start_message }}',
       '{{ $json.mensagem_final }}',
       'text', 'user', now(), now()
FROM conv;

parameters.query:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT cd.id, cd.person_id
  FROM commercial_deals cd
  JOIN persons pe ON pe.id = cd.person_id
  WHERE pe.telephone = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}'
    AND cd.discarded_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY cd.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
upd_person AS (
  UPDATE persons pe
  SET name      = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.nome }}',
      telephone = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}',
      email     = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.email }}',
      updated_at = now()
  FROM d
  WHERE pe.id = d.person_id
  RETURNING pe.id
),
upd_deal AS (
  UPDATE commercial_deals cd
  SET tier          = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.tier }}',
      segment       = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.segmento }}',
      kommo_lead_id = NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.id_kommo }}', ''), 'undefined'),
      sdr_user_id   = COALESCE(
                        (SELECT id FROM users WHERE lower(name) = lower('{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.usuario }}')),
                        cd.sdr_user_id),
      raw_payload   = COALESCE(cd.raw_payload, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
                        'utm_source',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_source }}',
                        'utm_medium',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_medium }}',
                        'utm_campaign', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_campaign }}',
                        'utm_content',  '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_content }}',
                        'utm_ad',       '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_term }}',
                        'utm_adset',    '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_adset }}',
                        'utm_platform', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_placement }}'
                      ),
      custom_properties = COALESCE(cd.custom_properties, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
                        'empresa', '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.empresa }}'
                      ),
      updated_at = now()
  FROM d
  WHERE cd.id = d.id
  RETURNING cd.id
)
UPDATE commercial_conversations c
SET kommo_external_conversation_id = NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.chat_id }}', ''), 'undefined'),
    updated_at = now()
FROM d
WHERE c.commercial_deal_id = d.id AND c.channel = 'whatsapp';

parameters.query:
WITH p AS (
  INSERT INTO persons (name, telephone, email, created_at, updated_at)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.nome }}',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.email }}',
    now(), now()
  )
  RETURNING id
),
d AS (
  INSERT INTO commercial_deals (
    person_id, status, tier, segment, kommo_lead_id,
    sdr_user_id, ai_enabled, raw_payload, custom_properties,
    created_at, updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    p.id, 'open',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.tier }}',
    '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.segmento }}',
    NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.id_kommo }}', ''), 'undefined'),
    (SELECT id FROM users WHERE lower(name) = lower('{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.usuario }}')),
    true,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'utm_source',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_source }}',
      'utm_medium',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_medium }}',
      'utm_campaign', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_campaign }}',
      'utm_content',  '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_content }}',
      'utm_ad',       '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_term }}',
      'utm_adset',    '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_adset }}',
      'utm_platform', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_placement }}'
    ),
    jsonb_build_object('empresa', '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.empresa }}'),
    now(), now()
  FROM p
  RETURNING id, person_id
)
INSERT INTO commercial_conversations (
  commercial_deal_id, person_id, kommo_external_conversation_id,
  channel, origin, conversation_type, status,
  message_count, last_message_at, started_at, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT d.id, d.person_id,
       NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.chat_id }}', ''), 'undefined'),
       'whatsapp', 'ia', 'ia', 'open',
       0, now(), now(), now(), now()
FROM d;

parameters.query:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT cd.id, cd.person_id
  FROM commercial_deals cd
  JOIN persons pe ON pe.id = cd.person_id
  WHERE pe.telephone = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}'
    AND cd.discarded_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY cd.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
upd_person AS (
  UPDATE persons pe
  SET name      = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.nome }}',
      telephone = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.numero }}',
      updated_at = now()
  FROM d
  WHERE pe.id = d.person_id
  RETURNING pe.id
),
upd_deal AS (
  UPDATE commercial_deals cd
  SET tier          = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.tier }}',
      segment       = '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.segmento }}',
      kommo_lead_id = '{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.id_kommo }}',
      sdr_user_id   = COALESCE(
                        (SELECT id FROM users WHERE lower(name) = lower('{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.usuario }}')),
                        cd.sdr_user_id),
      raw_payload   = COALESCE(cd.raw_payload, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
                        'utm_source',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_source }}',
                        'utm_medium',   '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_medium }}',
                        'utm_campaign', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_campaign }}',
                        'utm_content',  '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_content }}',
                        'utm_adset',    '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_adset }}',
                        'utm_platform', '{{ $('Webhook1').item.json.body.utm_placement }}'
                      ),
      custom_properties = COALESCE(cd.custom_properties, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
                        'empresa', '{{ $('variáveis webhook').item.json.empresa }}'
                      ),
      updated_at = now()
  FROM d
  WHERE cd.id = d.id
  RETURNING cd.id
)
UPDATE commercial_conversations c
SET kommo_external_conversation_id = '{{ $('Call Tratamento de dados na Kommo').item.json.chat_id }}',
    updated_at = now()
FROM d
WHERE c.commercial_deal_id = d.id AND c.channel = 'whatsapp';
